title: Positive Psychology
blurb: The science of wellbeing and what helps humans flourish.
lead: Positive psychology studies what makes life worth living — strengths, gratitude, meaning, and connection — and how to build more of it.

blocks.text: Positive psychology is the scientific study of wellbeing and flourishing, complementing the focus on illness with a focus on what helps people thrive.
It offers practical, testable practices — like gratitude, using your strengths, savouring, and building connection. Evidence for specific practices varies; many are promising.

resources.title: Greater Good in Action
resources.source: UC Berkeley Greater Good Science Center
